mapper.sql: id, user_id, question_id, course_id, note_content, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_question_note (user_id, question_id, course_id, note_content, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{courseId}, #{noteContent}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_question_note SET note_content = #{noteContent}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_question_note SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_question_note WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_question_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_question_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edu_question_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0
